suite.name: suite S1779380199683 2

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 — Successful Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: When Fill In Login Form With Valid Credentials
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'When Fill In Login Form With Valid Credentials' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'When Fill In Login Form With Valid Credentials' found.

kw.name: Then Products Page Should Be Displayed
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Access saucedemo.com, enter username 'standard_user' and password 'secret_sauce', click Login and verify the Products page title is visible.
test.status: No keyword with name 'When Fill In Login Form With Valid Credentials' found.

test.name: TC_002 — Failed Login With Wrong Password

kw.name: When Fill In Login Form With Wrong Password
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'When Fill In Login Form With Wrong Password' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'When Fill In Login Form With Wrong Password' found.

kw.name: Then Wrong Password Error Message Should Be Displayed
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Access saucedemo.com, enter username 'standard_user' and wrong password 'wrong_password', click Login and verify an error message is displayed.
test.status: No keyword with name 'When Fill In Login Form With Wrong Password' found.

test.name: TC_003 — Failed Login With Locked Out User

kw.name: When Fill In Login Form With Locked User Credentials
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'When Fill In Login Form With Locked User Credentials' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'When Fill In Login Form With Locked User Credentials' found.

kw.name: Then Locked User Error Message Should Be Displayed
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Access saucedemo.com, enter username 'locked_out_user' and password 'secret_sauce', click Login and verify a locked account error message is displayed.
test.status: No keyword with name 'When Fill In Login Form With Locked User Credentials' found.

suite.doc: Test suite for SauceDemo login scenarios
